title: Later Social Integration
excerpt: Our team has started using Later Social for our social media management, and we would like to be able to integrate with our Monday boards, similarly to the currently available Hootsuite integration! We would like the use…

posts.author: SydneyGWM (Sydney)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team has started using Later Social for our social media management, and we would like to be able to integrate with our Monday boards, similarly to the currently available Hootsuite integration! We would like the use the Monday boards to see posts and get approvals, without having to make updates on both platforms.
